VERIFICATION

Verification is intended to assist the Chocolatey moderators and community
in verifying that this package's contents are trustworthy.

1. Download the binary from the official GitHub releases:
   https://github.com/neul-labs/gity/releases/download/v0.1.0/gity-0.1.0-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip

2. Verify the SHA256 checksum matches the one in chocolateyinstall.ps1

3. The package source code is available at:
   https://github.com/neul-labs/gity
